projects.title: Image to WebP Converter
projects.description: A powerful tool to convert images to WebP format with compression options and batch processing. Supports JPG, PNG, GIF, and more.

projects.title: YouTube Downloader
projects.description: Download videos and audio from YouTube in various qualities with a simple web interface. Supports MP4, MP3, and playlist downloads.

projects.title: Boba Clicker Game
projects.description: An addictive clicker game where you collect boba points, unlock achievements, and compete with friends on the leaderboard!

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Modern, responsive portfolio website showcasing projects and skills with smooth animations and a fully functional news system.
